baseline.transcript: so my room doesn't have a lot of things but the things that are actually worth mentioning includes a bed on which i sleep or relax then i could see a pillow which helps me sleep faster then there is a table on which i spend most of my hours in a day on the table there are two laptops one is quite old which i use for some minimal tasks like surfing web or running a live server the other one is the main laptop which i usually use for my day-to-day task then i could see a few registers on my table alongside a few stationery which includes pen and pencil and i could see two mouses on my table and a rubik's cube also one earphones which i hardly use. test.transcript: I don't know much about machine learning, but from the overall point of view that I know is that machine learning requires some data, supervised or unsupervised, based on which we train our algorithms and machines to perform a specific task by recognizing the patterns within the data and so on.
